visual_description: A man in a white shirt holds a phone to his ear while walking past a desk where two colleagues are working; one man stands in the background near a monitor. The man on the phone walks with his head slightly turned, while the colleagues at the desk remain focused on their tasks. The scene is set in a modern office with glass partitions and typical work equipment visible.
audio_description: The audio features a male speaker with a neutral tone and moderate pace, speaking in Mandarin.
